title: UAL decode command
notes: Run this in a new VS Code terminal.
If the terminal was already open, run: source ~/.zshrc
Use decode ualip for Assets/Plugins/UAL/UALip.json, decode ualds for Assets/Plugins/UAL/UALds.json, etc.
The decoder automatically reads the key from /Volumes/MacMiniExternal2TB/Development/UAL-Decoder/UnityActivityLoggerKey.json
